title: KUAC 2021 Poster: Whaling Celebration by Ron Senungetuk
summary: View Larger The late Ron Senungetuk blazed trails as a sculptor, silversmith and woodcarver. The creator of KUAC’s 2021 poster, “Whaling Celebration,” passed away in 2020. Artist Kes Woodward said, “Ron’s impact on the Alaska art community and on Alaska as a place is really incredible.” Senungetuk w...
